summary.zh: 2D 场景资产生成器工作台,基于 @forgeax/node-runtime + node-runtime-react 的节点图编程应用。你用节点管线加模板批量生成 2D 场景资产,经 AI 生图节点出图,实时预览生成结果,管理版本化的资产库,并能从模板实例化分组、一键发布到游戏。它把零散的「生成一张图」整合成可复用、可批处理、可追溯的 2D 资产流水线。
summary.en: The 2D Scene Asset Generator workbench — a node-graph programming app on @forgeax/node-runtime + node-runtime-react. You batch-generate 2D scene assets through a node pipeline plus templates, produce images via AI generation nodes, preview live, manage a versioned asset library, instantiate groups from templates and publish to a game in one click. It turns ad-hoc 'generate an image' into a reusable, batchable, traceable 2D asset pipeline.

body.zh:
节点管线 + 模板批量生成 2D 资产
AI 生图节点 + 实时预览
body.en:
Node pipeline + templates batch 2D assets
AI image nodes + live preview

body.zh: 版本化资产库 · 模板实例化分组 · 一键发布到游戏
body.en: versioned library · template groups · one-click publish to game

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 打开面板或对话 /generate-2d-asset
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the panel or /generate-2d-asset

notes.zh: 首版:节点式 2D 场景资产生成器
notes.en: First release: node-based 2D scene asset generator
